column1: その映像はあまりに残酷で、見るに堪えない。
column2: そのえいぞうはあまりにざんこくで、みるにたえない。
column3: That footage is so cruel it cannot be borne to watch.
column4: に堪えない (cannot bear to ~, too ~ to endure; deeply ~)
column5: Verb[dict] + に堪えない / Noun + に堪えない
column6: ① cannot endure viewing/hearing (negative quality); ② deeply moved by (positive emotion overwhelming)
column7: に堪えない①: cruelty exceeds viewer's capacity to endure
column8: に堪えない① = too bad to bear viewing; でたまらない = overwhelmingly (physical); に堪えない② = deeply moved; 感に堪えない = overcome with feeling
